mapper.select: SELECT pf.product_id, pf.feature_id FROM pq_product_feature pf INNER JOIN pq_feature f ON f.id = pf.feature_id AND f.status = 1 WHERE pf.status = 1
SELECT feature_id FROM pq_product_feature WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY feature_id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE pq_product_feature SET status = 0 WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND status = 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO pq_product_feature ( product_id, feature_id, status ) VALUES
( #{productId}, #{featureId}, 1 )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE status = 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
